passes: pnpm typecheck exists, runs tsc -b with no emit, returns in seconds on an unchanged tree
an unused import in a src/ file fails pnpm lint with error (not warn)
pnpm lint on a single-file change uses cache and is measurably faster than a cold run

audit whether remoteAssetId / threadAssetId still carry runtime-irreversible risk (wire or DB residue); if yes add no-restricted-syntax with redirect message; if no, record rationale in harness-improvements.md and close this slice without adding rules
knip or ts-prune runnable via a single pnpm script
output format documented as input for cleanup-sweep; not wired into CI
AGENTS.md Long Tasks section requires docs/tasks/*.md to begin with a verbatim Intent block

scripts/roundtrip.ts accepts a task slug, checks out a worktree at the task-start commit, strips code so the subagent sees only AGENTS / decisions / MEMORY, emits a plan-vs-actual divergence report classified into categories A/B/C
end-to-end runnable on one past closed task in this repo
scripts/cleanup-sweep.ts reads retired identifiers from decisions.md plus dead-code scan output, emits a markdown report, never auto-fixes
each finding carries a stable anchor and a proposed fix or tradeoff
round-trip executed on one recently-closed task; divergence count and A/B/C breakdown recorded in harness-improvements.md
frequency decision written based on divergence density thresholds (0-2 / 3-5 / >5), committed into AGENTS.md or this md
